name: Chicken Chop Suey #1
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Uncooked chicken breast, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pan fry chicken in oil until cooked through. Remove from heat and set aside.
2. In another pan, crush the bouillon cubes and dissolve them in pineapple juice.
3. Add soy sauce, ginger, horseradish, celery, and green pepper to the pan. Heat through.
4. Combine the chicken with tomato, green onions, pea pods, and water chestnuts. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
5. Pour over fresh bean sprouts and top with pineapple sauce. Serve immediately.
